This is how to build a polyarket trading

three days, I've gotten a lot of

on its own that you just wake up and
it's made you $15 in your sleep.
And thinking about this, I thought the
best way of showing you how I've built
it is by literally showing you how I've
built it, by showing you the prompts
that I used to work on this bot with
Max, my AI agent. So, that being said,
let's let's get started with literally
the first prompt that I used on this
exact project, which was I will give you
a list of posts I found about us making
money. And then I proceeded to send him
a list of all the articles I managed to
find that popped on my feed about Poly
Market uh bots and OpenClaw
[clears throat] making money together.
And from that, it started telling me,
Got it. let me pull these tweets. It
pulled all of the different tweets. It
read through them. It understood what
they're about. And next up, I told him,
Let's do the same. Ask them to make
money. He always in in in my AI agents
max fashion, he said, Hell yes.
Looking at what they're doing, they're
basically three money streams. And he
categorized the different articles.
Polymarket referrals. Those are people
who just preach that they can make
money, but the real way that they're
making money is through the poly market
referral that they put in their
articles. So, they're not really making
money. Then there's copy trading bot

bot trading. Some are genuinely running
bots on Poly Market 15inut Bitcoin
Ethereum markets. Here's what we can do.
This is the perfect play. We already

like, Hey, listen. We have the

From that,
let me see. So, from that, that was its

agent
get to the goal I desire. You are the

With that being said, this is what it

And I answered these questions for it.
And it got started. So that's it.
over here it was saying boom it we went
through a long setup phase of
probably like an hour or two long where

cents,
52 cents. It was literally a coin flip

Buy up cheap before odds adjust. Chain

a way to pay for my claw subscription.
That being said, I sent it Matic. I

So, it spun up a new strategy after the

But with that being said, that was that
is the last slide. So that was the
thought process that I used in building

And then week two is about scaling it
from there.
Again, I don't want you to look at this

expecting the exact same results.
I want you to take away
the strategies you use in thinking when

What goal do you define for it? How well
